title: NADSSJL 6 Pcs Medium Gift Bags for Present - Birthday Gift Bag with Wrappers and Cards, Party Bags with Handles for Weddings, Birthdays, Parties, Valentine's Day and Christmas (Silvery)
features: Size: 28cm (L) × 10cm (W) × 20cm (H) – ideal for medium gifts. Decorate with tissue paper and include a greeting card to add a personal touch. Your loved ones, family, and friends will be truly touched when they receive this thoughtful gift!

Unique Design: The gift bags have a simple and exquisite appearance, paired with birthday gift paper, greeting cards, and ribbon bows, they appear more noble and elegant. Enhance your gifts and make them look more luxurious and special. It's great value for money!

High-Quality Material:Our present bags are made of environmentally friendly thick kraft paper. These party bags are durable, foldable, and easy to carry, thanks to the high-quality strong handle that provides excellent carrying strength.

Product Accessories: The pack includes 6 gift bags, 6 sheets of birthday paper, 6 ribbon bows, and 6 greeting cards, all conveniently stored inside the bag. The medium gift bags multipack is designed for long-lasting use. Please note that there may be a visible crease on the paper bag due to the manufacturing process.

Versatile Use: Our gift bag is perfect for a variety of occasions and is suitable for boys, girls, children, adult women, and the elderly. It is ideal for packaging birthday gifts, wedding gifts, business gifts, Valentine's Day gifts, Mother's Day gifts, anniversary gifts, New Year's Christmas gifts, Thanksgiving gifts, candies, kraft paper, and more.
